prompt: Users report layout 'shifts' on iPad when rotating between portrait and landscape. Sometimes text disappears. How do I systematically test orientation changes?
expected_output: Skill covers Phase 4 orientation testing: portrait and landscape captures at iPad viewports (768x1024 and 1024x768). Checks content reflow, navigation state consistency, no critical content cut off. Highlights safe area inset handling for notch-equipped devices. Produces evidence comparing before/after rotation.
